blocks.text: This slice closes the provider runtime gap where capability detection could select one executable path but process start could re-resolve a different same-name binary from `PATH`.

items: `bridge.Run` and `runtimeactor.Submit` pass the selected executable into provider `BuildStart`.
Claude, Codex, OpenClaw, and Cursor command builders prefer `StartOptions.Executable`, then `StartRequest.Executable`, then provider default executable name.
OpenClaw integration coverage starts the executable that passed the calendar-version detect gate.
Explicit `RIIDO_<PROVIDER>_PATH` remains a pin, not a hint.

blocks.text: This slice does not install provider CLIs, change provider auth, add SaaS endpoints, change assignment polling, or make daemon responsible for provider binary distribution.
